basics.label: Chief of Staff / Head of Operations – AI, Data, & Product Organizations

summary: Chief-of-Staff-style operator and product leader who turns executive vision into execution. 20+ years building operating models (OKRs/KPIs), agile cadences, and cross-functional programs across Engineering, Data Science, and Product. Expert in stakeholder management, executive communications, recruiting/onboarding, budget/vendor management, and policy-aligned delivery; hands-on with analytics and AI-enabled tooling.

highlights: Built operating cadence (OKRs, pipeline dashboards, partner updates) to source, diligence, and close acquisitions.
Owned stakeholder communications, vendor selection, data room hygiene, and board-ready materials.

Designed and ran the operating model for a full-stack replatform powering 70+ sites across 40+ hospitality brands (NA/EU/APAC), including quarterly planning, OKRs, agile ceremonies, demos, retros, and stakeholder readouts.
Built AI-enabled tooling to migrate and enrich product data for 14,000 SKUs in four languages; improved data quality and velocity.
Oversaw a 14-person global team across internal and third-party engineering; led recruiting, onboarding, and documentation hygiene.
Owned vendor strategy and procurement ("~10 systems" across payments, comments, and tax); established budget and compliance controls.
Delivered testing frameworks for orders and tax verification; ensured policy alignment and audit-ready records.

positions.position: Project Manager, Product Lead (Operating Cadence Turnaround)
highlights: Assumed lead role for a stalled $10MM eCommerce marketplace; instituted agile processes, clarified decision rights, and launched in 8 months.
Renegotiated primary platform relationship; managed multi-vendor delivery and onboarding accelerators (cut onboarding from 4 months to 2 weeks).
Partnered with executive stakeholders on roadmap, KPIs, and cross-functional communications.

positions.position: Interim Vice President, Strategy & Business Development (NBC Digital)
highlights: Partnered with President of Digital; developed OKRs/KPIs for new investments and identified 10+ business opportunities.
Presented industry analyses that led to enterprise partnerships; owned executive materials and decision forums.
Designed taxonomy/metadata and analytics frameworks enabling UX and reporting; increased LTV by 40% via retention KPIs.
Built clustering analyses to inform programming; launched third-party distribution (Amazon Channels).
Hired and managed a 4-person team; established onboarding and documentation hygiene.
Led procurement and negotiated Google MSA for digital attribution; implemented new enterprise KPIs across divisions.
Co-led strategic reorganization to establish a center of excellence; instituted budgeting and measurement processes.
Conceived and led adoption pilot increasing returning unique visitors by 300% in 9 months (portfolio application).
Built $120MM business model and labor plan for 17 apps; delivered regression analyses linking promotion to activity.
Published 200+ research reports; advised institutional investors; built company models and presented daily to sales/trading.
Supported primary/secondary offerings >$6B; frequent C-level engagements and formal communications.
Managed counterparty risk across 350+ names; evaluated ISDAs/CSAs, limits, margin, and structured mitigants across products.
Developed integrated models and emergency plans; partnered with Legal/Compliance on policy alignment.
Led 1,143 alumni; set governance operating model, communications cadence, and success metrics.
Led annual giving to #1 in dollars ($6.5MM) and participation (62.9%).
Organized record-breaking 2,000-person, $1MM+ reunion with a 30-volunteer committee; risk and vendor management.
Developing continuing education program with the university; stakeholder alignment and storytelling.

positions.position: Elected Class Officer – Alumni Council Executive Committee
highlights: Chair, Communications & Technology; Class Traditions working group; governance best-practices webinars.
Partnered across stakeholders to standardize processes and documentation hygiene.

education.institution: Tuck School of Business at Dartmouth
courses: Student Board – Quality of Life Chair
Thesis: Venture Capital and Long-Run Performance

publications.name: WineTaster3
highlights: Developed and published iOS app using SwiftUI; delivered a native visionOS version; released open-source statistical package.

publications.name: The Little Streaming Comedy Platform That Couldn’t
highlights: Oral history including product/ops perspective on Seeso launch and operations.
